no-restricted-globals.message: Use Decimal.js for monetary arithmetic instead of parseFloat.

no-restricted-globals.name: Number
no-restricted-globals.message: Use Decimal.js for monetary arithmetic instead of Number constructor.

Number constructor is banned in financial modules. Use Decimal.js instead.
